summary: Completed testing for Phase 1 Admin Setup Wizard feature. Backend API tests (7/7 passed) and Frontend UI verification completed successfully. Fixed a backend bug where mark_wizard_complete endpoint threw 500 error for non-ObjectId org_ids.

fixed.issue: 500 error when org_id is not a valid MongoDB ObjectId
fixed.resolution: Added ObjectId.is_valid() check before attempting org update

backend.GET /api/setup-wizard/progress/{org_id}: PASS - Returns default progress for unknown org
backend.POST /api/setup-wizard/progress/{org_id}: PASS - Saves and retrieves progress correctly
backend.POST /api/setup-wizard/bulk-invite: PASS - Creates users with temp passwords

frontend.step1_fields: PASS - Company Info shows: name, industry chips, phone, address, city, state, website, admin email
frontend.step_indicator: PASS - Shows 5 steps: Company Info, Branding, Review Links, Team Members, Summary
frontend.save_continue_button: PASS - Button visible and navigates to next step
frontend.menu_integration: PASS - Setup Wizard is FIRST item under Menu > Administration section
frontend.setup_wizard_menu_details: PASS - Shows 'Setup Wizard' with subtitle 'Configure a new business' and rocket icon

seed_data_creation: None - used existing store for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Setup Wizard has 4 backend endpoints all working. Frontend wizard is at /admin/setup-wizard with 5 steps. Step navigation uses animated transitions. Menu > Administration shows Setup Wizard as first item.
